reviews.comment:
No hay buena atención de los playeros, son lentos. Los autos se acumulan esperando que los atiendan. Además es la única estación de servicio que cobra el aire. Para inflar las cubiertas te cobran AR$500.- y solamente en efectivo (no aceptan ningún otro medio de pago) Lo peor: a los 4 minutos se corta el aire. Si hay que inflar más de un neumático no te alcanza. No vengan a esta estación de servicio, es la peor de la ciudad.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are terrible and slow. Cars pile up waiting to be served. Plus, it's the only gas station that charges for air. Inflating tires costs AR$500, and only in cash (they don't accept any other form of payment). The worst part: the air stops working after 4 minutes. If you need to inflate more than one tire, you won't have enough. Don't come to this gas station; it's the worst in the city.

reviews.comment:
Como recurrente cliente de YPF socio del ACA cargué combustible un par de veces y siempre bien.
Aproveché para sacar turno en boxes por la app de YPF para hacer service a mi auto.
Cuando voy a mi turno, el concesionario de Boxes (Raúl) me dice que no trabaja con la app 😳👎🏻
Pero que igual vuelva en un par de horas y me lo hacía…
Cuando le pregunto precio, le recuerdo que como socio del ACA tengo descuento en lubricantes oficiales Elaion. No sólo me dice que el no trabaja con el ACA tampoco, sino que tampoco usa ese aceite, sino otra marca. 😳👎🏻
A propósito, el precio que me pasa es precio turista (entiendo, aunque no hace falta que se abusen).
Al retirar el vehículo todo bien, hasta nos quedamos charlando.
Le pedí que me cambie las escobillas limpiaparabrisas y no lo hizo. 👎🏻
Al medir el aceite el día siguiente (ya en viaje), noto que está por encima del máximo, aunque no alcanzo a leer cuánto.
Unos km más adelante (ACA Esquel, excelentes!) lo hago revisar por un ruido que empezó a aparecer.
Resulta que tenía al menos 1,5 ltr de aceite de más, lo cual es muy perjudicial para el motor y sus componentes en el circuito de aceite! 👎🏻
El chico del ACA Esquel, Hernán, un genio, nota que el tapón del carter estaba sellado con pegamento, ya que ambas roscas (macho del tapón y hembra del carter) estaban lastimadas. 👎🏻
Aún si el de Boxes Ushuaia no produjo el daño él, lo menos que tendría que haber hecho es comentarme de la situación ya que iba a recorrer casi 10.000 km mas antes de llegar a casa. 👎🏻

(Translated by Google)
As a regular YPF customer and ACA member, I've filled up a couple of times at the station and it's always been fine.

I took the opportunity to book an appointment at the service bay through the YPF app to get my car serviced.
When I arrived for my appointment, the service bay attendant (Raúl) told me he didn't work with the app 😳👎🏻
But that I should come back in a couple of hours and he'd do it…
When I asked him the price, I reminded him that as an ACA member I get a discount on official Elaion lubricants. Not only did he tell me he didn't work with the ACA either, but that he didn't use that oil either, but a different brand. 😳👎🏻
By the way, the price he quoted me was the tourist price (I understand, but there's no need to take advantage).
When I picked up the car, everything was fine, we even chatted for a while.
I asked him to change the windshield wiper blades and he didn't. 👎🏻
When I checked the oil the next day (already on the road), I noticed it was above the maximum mark, although I couldn't see by how much.
A few kilometers later (at ACA Esquel, excellent service!), I had it checked because of a noise that had started.
It turns out I had at least 1.5 liters of oil too much, which is very harmful to the engine and its components in the oil circuit! 👎🏻
The guy at ACA Esquel, Hernán, a genius, noticed that the oil drain plug was sealed with glue, since both threads (the male thread on the plug and the female thread on the oil pan) were damaged. 👎🏻
Even if the guy at Boxes Ushuaia didn't cause the damage himself, the least he could have done was tell me about the situation, since I was going to drive almost 10,000 km more before getting home. 👎🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pobFpUUmliRzlWVFcxMlVsVjNabWRpVEVvMlQyYxAB

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kd1FXNDVPVjlVTTFSa2VVOVZSMnB1VmsxbVFXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre elegí esta estación por su ubicación y la buena atención, incluso lamenté mucho cuando cerró temporalmente. Me alegró su reapertura, pero lamentablemente hoy debo publicar mi primera queja.
​Ayer, tras cargar combustible a las 21:30 hs, estacioné para usar el baño y me informaron que los cierran a las 21:00 hs. Me parece inaceptable que una estación con servicio Full y atención las 24 horas no permita a sus clientes acceder al baño por la noche. Es una falta de servicio básico que empaña la buena experiencia que venía teniendo. Espero que revisen esta política pronto.

(Translated by Google)
I always chose this station for its location and excellent service, and I was very disappointed when it temporarily closed. I was happy when it reopened, but unfortunately, today I must post my first complaint.

Yesterday, after filling up at 9:30 PM, I parked to use the restroom and was informed that they close at 9:00 PM. I find it unacceptable that a station with full service and 24-hour attention does not allow its customers to use the restroom at night. It's a lack of basic service that tarnishes the otherwise good experience I've been having. I hope they review this policy soon.
